title: sorbus incisa
intro: Sorbus incisa, also known as the Japanese rowan or Korean whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sorbus incisa include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Sorbus incisa is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
